top_five.rationale: Closest BYO-content competitor: ingests PDFs/decks and AI-builds courses + quizzes. Same pitch shape as ours, but generic outputs, no SG library, hosted offshore.
The category default for authoring. Even with AI Assistant it still expects manual slide-by-slide rebuilds; price floor (~US$1,399/yr/author) excludes the $99-$299 platform band we own.
Strongest PPT-import on the market and active in SG. Ingests slides 1:1 but doesn't reverse-engineer to modular units, and ships zero SG-HR baseline content.
The squeeze threat at SME entry tier: SG HRMS already inside the buyer's wallet, adding bundled learning. Thin authoring, no AI ingest, but distribution moat in 5,000+ SG SMEs.
The actual incumbent we displace. Free, sticky, but no analytics, no audit trail, no quiz auto-generation. Every BYO-deck buyer already lives here.

competitors.name: Coursebox AI
competitors.primary_value_prop: Turn your documents and videos into AI-generated courses and quizzes in minutes.
strengths: Closest BYO-content shape on the market
Active in APAC via Sydney HQ
weaknesses: Hosted offshore (US/AU) — PDPA residency arguments land
Quiz quality reportedly variable on technical decks
competitors.website_design_notes: Modern AI-SaaS aesthetic; clean pricing table; demo video on hero.

competitors.name: Articulate 360 (Rise + Storyline + AI Assistant)
competitors.hq: New York, USA (APAC ops via Sydney)
competitors.pricing_range_published: US$1,399/yr per author (Personal) → US$1,749/yr (Teams) → Enterprise quote
competitors.primary_value_prop: The industry-standard course-authoring suite for L&D professionals.
strengths: AI Assistant (text rewrite + image generation + translation) since Jan 2025
weaknesses: Per-author license — every author needs $1,399/yr seat
No native LMS (you still need TalentLMS/Docebo/etc)
AI Assistant still requires manual slide-by-slide build — not BYO-deck ingest
Not designed for SME self-serve; expects L&D specialists
competitors.website_design_notes: Corporate-SaaS clean; pricing transparent; AI features front-and-centre on homepage post-2025 refresh.

competitors.name: iSpring Learn (+ iSpring Suite)
competitors.pricing_range_published: US$3.66/user/mo (Start, 100 users) → US$4.30 (Business) → Suite at US$770/author/yr
competitors.primary_value_prop: Build courses from PowerPoint — fast LMS for corporate training.
strengths: Best PPT import on the market (1:1 fidelity)
Suite + LMS bundle reduces tool sprawl
weaknesses: PPT-import is NOT reverse-engineering — still slide-by-slide, no modular restructuring
Quizzes still hand-authored (AI assist is text rewrites only)
Russia-dev legacy creates procurement friction for some SG buyers
competitors.website_design_notes: Functional SaaS; live-chat aggressive; comparison tables vs Articulate are well-built.

competitors.name: Synthesia
competitors.primary_value_prop: Create studio-quality training videos from text using AI avatars in minutes.
weaknesses: Output is video only — no quiz / module / progress tracking
Need to pair with an LMS (often Articulate or Docebo)
$89/mo seat ceiling tight if many authors
competitors.website_design_notes: Best-in-class motion-design site; avatar demos auto-play; pricing transparent.

competitors.name: HeyGen (Academy mode)
competitors.primary_value_prop: AI video for sales and L&D — turn scripts into avatar-presented modules.
strengths: Strong AI translation/lip-sync — useful for SG English-to-Mandarin
competitors.website_design_notes: Hero auto-plays avatar; CTA dense; pricing one click deep.

competitors.name: Sana Labs
competitors.primary_value_prop: AI-native learning platform — generates, personalises, and assesses at scale.
weaknesses: Enterprise pricing — out of SG SME reach
Outputs trend generic without curation; needs L&D team to ground
No SG presence beyond opportunistic deals
competitors.website_design_notes: Editorial-modern; case studies front and centre; pricing hidden behind sales.

competitors.name: Tovuti LMS
competitors.primary_value_prop: All-in-one LMS with 40+ interactive content types and AI-assisted authoring.
weaknesses: AI is outline-from-prompt, not BYO-deck ingest
competitors.website_design_notes: Dense; feature-checklist heavy; pricing visible but tier-bands cramped.

competitors.name: Docebo (+ Shape AI)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Enterprise learning platform with AI content generation (Shape) and learner discovery (Coach).
strengths: Shape (AI from sources, 2024) is the closest enterprise analog to our pitch
SG enterprise presence via APAC team
weaknesses: Shape outputs require L&D curation to be useful
competitors.website_design_notes: Enterprise SaaS polish; case studies and analyst quotes dominate; pricing gated.

competitors.name: TalentLMS (Epignosis)
competitors.hq: San Francisco, USA (APAC channel via Cyprus parent Epignosis)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Free (5 users) → US$69/mo (Starter, 40 users) → US$149 (Basic, 100) → US$279 (Plus, 250)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Cloud LMS made easy — get courses live in a day, at SMB-friendly pricing.
weaknesses: AI is prompt-to-outline, not BYO-deck ingest
Per-tier user caps create upgrade pressure
competitors.website_design_notes: Friendly SMB SaaS; pricing transparent; free-tier CTA dominant.

competitors.name: 360Learning
competitors.primary_value_prop: Collaborative learning — turn your subject-matter experts into course authors.
strengths: AI co-author since 2023 (lifts text from docs)
weaknesses: AI is co-author assist, not full BYO-deck reverse-engineering
EU data residency only — PDPA arguments awkward
competitors.website_design_notes: Editorial-marketing; testimonials prominent; clean pricing reveal.

competitors.name: Moodle Workplace
competitors.pricing_range_published: Custom (via Certified Partner; typically S$8-30k/yr in SG)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Open-source LMS tailored for workplace learning, deployed by certified partners.
weaknesses: Total cost ≥ enterprise SaaS once partner fees included
competitors.website_design_notes: Open-source community site; documentation-led; pricing only via partners.

competitors.name: Cornerstone Learning
competitors.primary_value_prop: Talent experience platform — learning, skills, performance for the enterprise.
competitors.website_design_notes: Enterprise B2B; analyst-quote heavy; demo gated; pricing absent.

competitors.name: SAP SuccessFactors Learning
competitors.primary_value_prop: Enterprise learning inside the SAP SuccessFactors HXM suite.
strengths: SAP shop default; zero-procurement-friction inside SAP estates
competitors.website_design_notes: SAP corporate; product fragmented across pages; pricing gated.

competitors.name: Workday Learning
competitors.pricing_range_published: Bundled with Workday HCM (typically US$100-200/user/yr at large enterprise)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Native learning inside Workday — recommended content for every employee.
weaknesses: Sub-2,000-seat firms rarely have Workday in SG
competitors.website_design_notes: Enterprise B2B; high-polish; demo gated.

competitors.name: Disprz
competitors.primary_value_prop: AI-led skilling platform combining LXP + LMS with content authoring.
strengths: Author AI ingests SCORM, video, docs
Aggressive enterprise sales motion in SEA
weaknesses: Frontline tilt — pitch overlaps blue-collar (not our buyer)
competitors.website_design_notes: Enterprise SaaS; case studies + AI features rotated on hero; pricing gated.

competitors.name: CloudKampus
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore-grown LMS for SME and training-provider workflows.
competitors.website_design_notes: Dated; long-scroll feature list; pricing partly gated; demo CTA buried.

competitors.name: Skillgrasp
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore corporate LMS with off-the-shelf SG-compliance modules.
weaknesses: Content catalogue smaller than our 56-module baseline
competitors.website_design_notes: Functional; price absent on homepage; demo via form only.

competitors.name: Wizlearn Technologies
competitors.pricing_range_published: Custom (SG-government RFQ band; typically S$30-150k project)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Established Singapore LMS partner for government and education.
competitors.website_design_notes: Corporate-services site; aged design; no pricing; contact form only.

competitors.name: ConnectAll Learning
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore LMS + corporate training services bundle.
competitors.website_design_notes: Dated brochure-ware; pricing absent; weak mobile.

competitors.name: Talenox (Learn module)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Payroll from S$5/user/mo; Learn add-on roadmap
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore-native HRMS — payroll, leave, claims, and an emerging learning module.
weaknesses: Learn module is checklist-shaped, not authoring
competitors.website_design_notes: Modern HR-SaaS; pricing transparent; product tour interactive.

competitors.name: JustLogin (Learning add-on)
competitors.pricing_range_published: From S$3/user/mo modules; Learning module bundled in HRMS quote
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore HRMS bundling payroll, leave, claims and learning in one stack.
weaknesses: Learning is consumption-only catalog, not authoring
competitors.website_design_notes: HRMS-marketing standard; pricing per module; demo gated.

competitors.name: BambooHR (Learning)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Bundled within BambooHR plans (Core or Pro tier; ~US$8.75/user/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Light learning bundled into the SMB-friendly BambooHR suite.
weaknesses: Hard to surface to non-BambooHR buyers
competitors.website_design_notes: Polished SMB-SaaS; demo abundant; pricing partial (annual band).

competitors.name: Deel Engage (Learning + Performance)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Learning + performance + engagement bundled into the Deel global HR stack.
weaknesses: AI course-builder is prompt-from-topic, not BYO-deck ingest
Engage often discounted away in EOR deals — strategic priority unclear
competitors.website_design_notes: High-polish SaaS marketing; pricing transparent; AI demo prominent.

competitors.name: Multiplier (Learning add-on)
competitors.pricing_range_published: Bundled with EOR (US$400+/employee/mo); learning is add-on / roadmap
competitors.primary_value_prop: EOR-led global hiring with bundled HR adjacents — onboarding and learning.
strengths: SG-HQ'd; brand affinity with our buyer
weaknesses: Customer is EOR-employee, not org-wide training
competitors.website_design_notes: Modern global-payroll site; pricing on request; learning buried under onboarding.

competitors.name: DIY: SharePoint + Microsoft Forms
competitors.pricing_range_published: Bundled into M365 Business Standard / Premium (S$15-32/user/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Use what you already pay for — drop decks in SharePoint, build quizzes in Forms.
weaknesses: No analytics depth; no per-question heatmaps
competitors.website_design_notes: Microsoft estate site; pricing visible inside M365 tier table; demo overwhelming.

competitors.name: DIY: Google Drive + Google Forms
competitors.primary_value_prop: Use what you already pay for — Drive for decks, Forms for quizzes.
strengths: Forms quiz mode is decent for simple MCQ
weaknesses: No audit log fit for compliance
competitors.website_design_notes: Google Workspace marketing; pricing transparent; demo via free trial.

competitors.name: DIY: Notion + Tally/Typeform
competitors.pricing_range_published: Notion S$14/user/mo (Plus) + Tally free / Typeform US$25/mo
competitors.primary_value_prop: Wiki-style training pages in Notion + quizzes in Tally/Typeform.
competitors.website_design_notes: Best-in-class minimal site; templates everywhere; pricing transparent.

competitors.name: DIY: SOP packs + WhatsApp broadcast
competitors.primary_value_prop: Print the SOP, push it on WhatsApp, hope it's read.
weaknesses: Manager has no idea who knows what
competitors.website_design_notes: WhatsApp Business site is product-led; no relevant pricing for this use case.

competitors.name: KnowBe4
competitors.pricing_range_published: US$4-15/user/yr depending on tier and seat count
competitors.primary_value_prop: Security awareness training and simulated phishing at scale.
weaknesses: Library is global; not SG HR/AI/productivity
competitors.website_design_notes: Security-vendor aesthetic; cyber-statistic-heavy; pricing partly visible.

competitors.name: Coursera for Business (SG catalogue)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Catalog of university and partner courses for workforce skill-building.
weaknesses: Generic content; not your company's voice
competitors.website_design_notes: Education-marketplace marketing; catalog-led; pricing one click deep.
